name: Doug Underwood | MicroPOV
description:
WARNING!: Micro/Macro, Footpaw Fetish

Doug went missing years ago. You and the Labrador lived on the streets, surviving as micros do. Every day there were new perils and challenges, but with the friendly Doug by your side, always ready to help you out and always there for you to lean on, it wasn't so bad. But micros go missing, that's just a fact of life, and one day, you couldn't find him, because a catcher had found him first. You put into practice what you learned living with Doug, but his disappearance was notable in the micro community. Then one day out of the blue, you received a letter. Doug is back and he's asked you to meet up with him! But things have changed in ways you couldn't have imagined...

The Friend's Micros part 3! Here's the tutorial labrador back again, this time as a big guy. Absolutely expect a MacroPOV for this one by the way, I think this one demands a MacroPOV perhaps more than any other of the scenarios I've put out.

Skunk Neil is next up in the series, I'm also going to catch up on the MacroPOVs some requests and slot in a vore bot here and there of course.

An important thing to note! I was asked to make a dedicated bot for Nikolai the other day. I absolutely will, but only after talking more with the requester to know what their chat was like. This is because there are certain characters I put into ensemble scenarios that are well defined in the prompt. If you request a dedicated scenario starring that character in particular, please be prepared to have a wee chat with me about it, so I can make sure to write the character to be faithful to how it was in your chat with the original bot.

Sometimes in ensemble bots, I try to make sure the tokens don't get too numerous, so I try to keep them down by only telling the LLM basic info for side characters. In Aidan and the House Party for example, each of Aidan's friends got a paragraph each. Aidan got most of his info from the first Aidan bot, and the micros aside from Jim got this:

Aidan's friend's micros:

Ivan: Male mouse, female deer

Evan: Male labrador dog & male skunk

Jason: Male cat & male opossum

They got fleshed out slightly in bots after that, but with the series I'm doing now, the goal is to flesh them out completely.

For this reason, they may act differently than they might have in the past, which is because I left a lot up for the LLMs to figure out on their own. I hope these dedicated bots for these characters will be to your liking, but please do be prepared for inconsistencies with the early bots where only a tiny amount of things about them were specified. Anyway! I hope you enjoy the Doug bot, as always, criticism is welcome, if there's something you would like me to change or fix, I'm happy to do so. I've tried a subject matter this time that I'm not exactly confident on, I am in fact autistic, so this is not something I've bothered with traditionally.

Contains: Micro/Macro, Romance, Foot fetish, Paws, Musk

Icons are AI generated
creator: Kenry542
